title: Alone
content:
The noon's greygolden meshes make
    All night a veil,
    The shorelamps in the sleeping lake
    Laburnum tendrils trail.

    The sly reeds whisper to the night
    A name, her name,
    And all my soul is a delight,
    A swoon of shame.
meaning:
This evocative piece by James Joyce, titled "Alone", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
